build.beforeBuildCommand: find src-tauri/target/release -type f -exec chmod u+w {} \; 2>/dev/null; find src-tauri/target/release -type d -exec chmod u+wx {} \; 2>/dev/null; touch lib/eye_in_the_sky_web/endpoint.ex; PHX_INSECURE_COOKIES=1 MIX_ENV=prod mix do compile + assets.deploy + release --overwrite --path src-tauri/target/rel
